reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the person Alan Hevesi defeated in the 2002 New York Comptroller election.
2. Determine which New York representative and politician matches that person and return the name.
original_final_question: What New York representative and politician was defeated by Alan Hevesi in 2002? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Who did Alan Hevesi defeat in the 2002 New York Comptroller election? Evidence: New York Comptroller election, 2002: New York City Comptroller Alan G. Hevesi defeated former Assembly Minority Leader John Faso. -> John Faso

Node 2: Which New York representative and politician matches the person Alan Hevesi defeated? Evidence: John Faso: John James Faso Jr. (born August 25, 1952) is an American politician and the U.S. Representative for New York 's 19 congressional district since January 3, 2017. -> John Faso
